name: Shin Zu Shing Co., Ltd.
summary: Shin Zu Shing Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells precision springs, stamped parts, and hinge assemblies in Taiwan. It also provides metal injection molding (MIM) and lathe products. The company offers its products for use in notebook and tablet PCs, LCD monitors, and MIM products, as well as communication, computer, and consumer products. The company was formerly known as Zu Shing Spring and Mechanical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shin Zu Shing Co., Ltd. in 1997. Shin Zu Shing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
